supporting_quote: CTGF message was measured by quantitative real time polymerase chain reaction (RT-PCR) (Primer/Probe sets shown below) and the results were normalized to total RNA.
notes: Isis/CTGF patent. In-vitro cell-culture screen (primary keratinocyte/dermal cells, 96-well, lipofectamine) explicitly normalized to total RNA. Generic boilerplate also offers cyclophilin A or total RNA via RIBOGREEN; the actual in-vitro result statement uses total RNA. No ACTB.

supporting_quote: PEPCK-M RNA transcript levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN. Results are presented as percent inhibition of PEPCK-M, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis/PEPCK-M patent. Example 1 = Antisense Inhibition of human PEPCK-M in T-24 cells (electroporation, RTS133). Boilerplate offers GAPDH/cyclophilin/total RNA but the T-24 in-vitro result is adjusted to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. No ACTB.

supporting_quote: Gene target quantities obtained by real time RT-PCR are normalized by quantifying total RNA using RiboGreen (Molecular Probes, Inc. Eugene, Oreg.).
notes: Ionis/STAT3 patent. STAT3 mRNA measured in A549 (human lung carcinoma) by real-time PCR (PPS 199), normalized via total RNA RiboGreen. bDNA keyword hits were false positives ('branched hydrocarbyl'). No ACTB.

supporting_quote: Total RNA is quantified using RiboGreen RNA quantification reagent (Molecular Probes, Inc. Eugene, Oreg.). ... 170 uL of RiboGreen working reagent ... is pipetted into a 96-well plate containing 30 uL purified, cellular RNA. The plate is read in a CytoFluor 4000.
notes: Isis/C-raf patent. In-vitro C-raf assays in A549 measured by quantitative real-time PCR, reported as percent inhibition relative to untreated control. Boilerplate offers GAPDH/cyclophilin/total RNA but only the RiboGreen total-RNA protocol is described in detail (no GAPDH primer-probe given), so total RNA is the actual in-vitro normalizer. GAPDH=13 hits are decoys: Northern-blot loading control ('normalized to GAPDH levels in untreated controls') + multiplexing methodology + boilerplate. Confidence medium because the A549 qPCR statement does not name the normalizer verbatim. No ACTB.

supporting_quote: To normalize for variations in loading and transfer efficiency membranes were stripped and probed for glyceraldehyde-3-phosphate dehydrogenase (G3PDH) RNA (Clontech, Palo Alto, Calif.). ... Data was normalized to G3PDH levels in untreated controls.
notes: Isis/CD40 patent (2007). SURPRISE: no RIBOGREEN anywhere in this patent. Primary mRNA quantitation is real-time PCR (preferred) but its exact normalizer is not stated verbatim; the only explicit normalization statement is G3PDH (=GAPDH) for the corroborating Northern blot. In-vitro screen cells T-24/A549 (standard Isis lines). Marked housekeeping_gene/GAPDH at medium confidence because GAPDH is the only documented normalizer and total-RNA basis is absent. used_actb=no.

supporting_quote: transthyretin mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. ... Transthyretin mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN. Results are presented as percent inhibition of transthyretin, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis/TTR patent. All HepG2 in-vitro examples (RTS1396/RTS3029, lipofectin & electroporation) adjusted to total RNA content via RIBOGREEN (24 occurrences). One stray 'normalized to cyclophilin' is a decoy. No ACTB.
